name: PactumJS
description: REST API testing tool for Node.js that supports e2e, integration, contract and component tests with a chainable fluent syntax.

seo.title: PactumJS — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: PactumJS: REST API testing tool for Node.js that supports e2e, integration, contract and component tests with a chainable fluent syntax.

when_to_use: End-to-end and contract tests for Node.js REST APIs
Chainable fluent syntax for complex HTTP test scenarios
Component test isolation with mock server integration
Store and reuse data across test steps with variables

pros: Unified API for e2e, contract, and component tests
Built-in data management and mock server
No extra runners needed beyond Mocha/Jest
cons: Smaller community than Supertest or Postman
Node.js only, not a polyglot tool
review.verdict: A solid all-in-one REST testing kit for Node.js if you want more than Supertest without adopting Postman.
review.best_for: Node.js teams wanting contract plus integration tests in one library
review.not_for: Polyglot shops needing a tool that works beyond JavaScript

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
